name: LedgerUpdater

neutralConcepts: atomic incrementAndRecord() ONE call — no separate read-then-write
waits for T84 (pointBreakdown) AND T96 (streakBonus) before writing
knowledgeScope PRIVATE — ledger record is per-user

ironRules.rule: atomic incrementAndRecord() is ONE call — never a separate getBalance → computeNew → setBalance sequence (race condition)
T85 waits for BOTH T84 (pointBreakdown) AND T96 (streakBonus) before writing the ledger record
DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE LedgerUpdated enqueue. Order: store-ledger → enqueue.
knowledgeScope = PRIVATE — ledger records are per-user and must not be stored as GLOBAL

keywords: ledger updater atomic increment record points streak bonus private
